notes: Executable parity for Shopify's documented `productOptionsCreate(variantStrategy: CREATE)` fanout. The live fixture captures a default-only product where CREATE replaces the default Title option with Color, keeps the original default variant for the first value, creates a second variant for the second value, marks both option values variant-backed, and exposes the same graph on an immediate downstream product read. Proxy replay first hydrates the captured pre-mutation product through a public product read, then runs the supported mutation locally.
